integration_blocked_until: operator posts HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-NNN in monitor/decisions/human-notes.json with author: operator, status: pending, and approved_exp_ids containing 'EXP-210'. Additional ordering constraint: EXP-202 (tokens) must be integrated before or in the same batch as EXP-210.
summary: EXP-A5 of the Phase A design refresh is drafted: restrict red to actual in-table contradictions (brief Item 7). Re-routes --refuted / --refuted-solid verdict tokens through EXP-202's --semantic-crit / --semantic-crit-soft tokens (keeping verdict pills red but tokenized). Neutralizes seven stat-card border-lefts (#c45050, #8b0000) to var(--rule) across generate-html.js and sections.json. Migrates six kill-shot inline 'Refuted by Data' / 'Decisive' pill-badges in part5.html from raw hex to semantic-crit tokens. Migrates .ca-tag.tag-monitoring-hardcoded to --semantic-warn (amber — its semantic is warning, not refutation). Neutralizes one [SUSPENDED] prose-inline span to var(--ink-3). Preserves 'Kill Shots' term, label, and tab chrome. Pie-chart SVG intentionally left untouched as a Phase B item. HARD HOLD: do NOT integrate; wait for operator-posted approval HNOTE naming EXP-210. Three further Phase A EXPs (A6 accuracy-math demotion, A7 Latest Findings demotion, A8 a11y audit + fixes) remain to be drafted in subsequent analyst runs.
curmudgeon_review_note: This EXP is eligible for adversarial review. Curmudgeon focus areas: (1) Kill-shot badges — is the judgment call to keep them red (routed through --semantic-crit) defensible against the brief's strict 'in-table cells only' rule? (2) Pie-chart SVG deferral — is 'data-viz earns its red' a valid carve-out or is it a cop-out that leaves the most visible red on the page untouched? (3) .ca-tag.tag-monitoring-hardcoded → --semantic-warn — is the 'warning not refutation' semantic re-classification correct, or should it neutralize fully to --ink-3 like the other ca-tag variants? (4) Are the new dark-theme values (--semantic-crit = #d46a6a on #1a1a2e bg) a JND-small visual shift from the current #ef5350 or a noticeable step change? (5) Does neutralizing the FAIL-NNN entry-card border-lefts weaken the signal that silent failures are failures, or does the prose adequately carry that verdict? Draft must stay DRAFT_AWAITING_HUMAN_GROUP_REVIEW regardless of curmudgeon outcome — the operator-group review is the gate.
